# Stage 3 — Cohort centering

```{r stage-03-setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("..", "R", "00_atlas_setup.R"))
atlas_env <- require.atlas.checkpoint(2)
```

```{r stage-03}
atlas_env <- run_stage_03_center(atlas_env)
assign("atlas_env", atlas_env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
atlas_env$centering_baseline
```
